_comment:
Canonical nousinfosystems.com generated project — C1 regression gate.
Used by server/fixtures/typecheck-canonical.ts to run `tsc --noEmit` in CI without calling the Claude API.
Update this fixture by regenerating a Nous project in NAT 2.0 and replacing the generatedFiles below.

generatedFiles.content:
import type { Page } from '@playwright/test';

/**
 * Object Repository — NousinfosystemsHome page
 * All selectors live here. Import this from pages/*.ts only — never from tests.
 */
export const NousinfosystemsHomePageLocators = {
  heroHeading: (page: Page) =>
    page.locator('h1').first(),

  servicesSection: (page: Page) =>
    page.locator('section').nth(1),

  contactUsLink: (page: Page) =>
    page.getByRole('link', { name: /contact.*us/i }).first(),

  aboutUsLink: (page: Page) =>
    page.getByRole('link', { name: /about.*us/i }).first(),

  getStartedButton: (page: Page) =>
    page.getByRole('button', { name: /get.*started/i }).first(),

  navigationMenu: (page: Page) =>
    page.locator('nav').first(),

  logoLink: (page: Page) =>
    page.locator('header a').first(),
};
